Off Calendar Dec-09-2013 Continued To Jan-02-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued to January 2, 2014. The parties shall provide Dept. 302 with a copies of every P.U.C. case cited in the briefs (for example, In re Pacific Gas & Electric Co. (1997) 71 Cal.P.U.C.2d 471, Southern California Edison Co. (2004) Cal. P.U.C. Dec. No. 04-04-065, 2004 WL 1150966), with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 13, 2013. The cases supplied should be preceded with a table of authorities and have exhibit tabs. The Court does not have other have access to these authorities. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Continued To Dec-09-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS Continued to December 9, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the reply papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 18, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and opposition papers. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
